overview: Lava Golem is a SubBoss-class Elemental monster found in Firedeep. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 1200 HP, 30 physical damage, 150 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 5, MaxImpactEndurance 8. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack2 at 200% ratio (600 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Spawn Lava Explosion Nightmare.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Lava Damage
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Lava Damage icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Attack2 (200% ratio)
strategies.description: Attack2 deals 600 damage at base (200% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Spawn Lava Explosion Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Spawn Lava Explosion Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Spawn Lava Explosion Nightmare

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
